title: Privacy-Preserving Sensor Activation Codes
strategies: checker baseline: deterministic first-fit over a short public pseudo-random constant-weight stream
larger shuffled first-fit stream that packs more rows while checking overlap and cover-free constraints incrementally
multi-start shuffled construction with local repair: replace small conflicting blocker sets, then greedily refill
stronger approaches could use simulated annealing, SAT/ILP repair neighborhoods, or cover-free-code specific algebraic seeds; the finite optimum is not known in closed form
